breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where LLM-generated rewards_box payloads use non-standard keys ('xp' and 'gold_pieces' instead of 'xp_gained' and 'gold'). The fix adds a normalization function that coerces values from fallback keys and removes them after processing. The test is a real E2E test that prompts the LLM to produce messy keys and verifies normalization occurs. Code is well-structured with clear naming, though error handling could be more explicit.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function with fallback key logic for xp/xp_gained and gold/gold_pieces
Modified _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair() to call normalization on passthrough rewards
Added E2E test file that prompts LLM to generate non-standard rewards_box keys
Uses deepcopy to avoid mutating original rewards_box
Removes fallback keys after normalization to ensure consistent output
